templates.description: Illustrated landscape aesthetic with a light lavender and navy blue color palette. Features silhouette graphics of nature elements like mountains, trees, and animals. Playful brush-style headline font paired with clean sans-serif body text.
templates.hook: Light lavender gradient background featuring a large navy blue silhouette of a deer head with antlers in the foreground. Layered mountain range illustrations in shades of blue and purple span the background, with scattered white clouds and small birds flying in the distance. The layout features a large, brush-style headline in navy blue positioned centrally, with clean sans-serif subtext below and branding at the top left.
templates.body: Consistent light lavender gradient background with layered mountain illustrations. The content area features a centered brush-style headline in navy blue followed by a paragraph of sans-serif text. The bottom of the slide is anchored by a dark blue silhouette ridge featuring various animals walking along the horizon, creating a continuous landscape effect.
templates.cta: Maintains the light lavender landscape theme. Features a prominent navy blue silhouette of a primate hanging from a branch on the left side. A large brush-style headline invites action, supported by a short paragraph of text and a website URL at the bottom, balanced by the illustrated elements.

templates.description: Sophisticated editorial style with a cream background. High-contrast large black serif typography paired with elegant orange accents. Uses generous negative space and structured typographic hierarchy.
templates.hook: Clean cream solid background. The design is typographic-led, featuring a very large, high-contrast black serif headline aligned to the left. An orange accent color is used for branding elements at the bottom and a tagline. The layout relies on generous negative space and elegant font pairings to create a sophisticated editorial look.
templates.body: Cream background with a text-heavy layout. Features a large, centered serif statement in black, followed by a secondary statement or transition phrase in the accent orange color. The design emphasizes hierarchy through font size and color contrast.
templates.cta: Cream background. The text takes center stage with large, elegant serif typography in the accent orange color, occupying the upper and middle portions of the slide. A small, understated reminder text is placed at the bottom right, maintaining the minimalist and spacious feel.

templates.description: Professional and clean aesthetic with a light blue and navy color scheme. Uses geometric circular accents and rounded containers. Typography mixes bold display serifs with clean sans-serifs.
templates.hook: Light off-white/pale blue background. Large navy blue display typography for the main headline, paired with a sans-serif subhead. A light blue rectangular bar highlights a portion of the text. Geometric circular accents in navy blue anchor the right edge. Includes a profile picture placeholder at the bottom left for personal branding.
templates.body: Light background. A prominent white rounded-square container with a thin navy border sits in the center, housing the main content. The slide has style header in the navy display font. Inside the container, a bold sans-serif headline and body text are aligned. Geometric circular accents appear on the edges.
templates.cta: High-contrast solid navy blue background. The text is reversed out in white, featuring a bold sans-serif headline. A light blue horizontal bar contains a decorative display font question. White outline-style social icons are centered at the bottom, creating a clean, professional closing.

templates.description: Dark, moody, and premium aesthetic. Uses dark brown backgrounds with photography overlays and white typography. Features elegant serif fonts mixed with flowing script accents and delicate star graphics.
templates.hook: Dark, moody brown background. An atmospheric photography overlay (e.g., hands holding a phone) fades into the dark background. Typography mixes an elegant white serif with a flowing italic script for emphasis. A four-point star graphic accent is centered at the top, adding a premium, delicate touch.
templates.body: Dark brown background. A large white hairline-border rounded rectangle frames the text content. A circular photography element interacts with the border at the top. The typography continues the serif and script mix for titles. A star accent anchors the bottom of the frame.
templates.cta: Distinct visual shift to a light/white background with a high-key lifestyle photograph on the left. The right side features a clean white overlay with large black serif typography and a sans-serif subhead. A pill-shaped outline button contains the website URL, creating a bright, high-contrast ending to the dark sequence.

templates.description: Organic and immersive aesthetic using full-bleed nature photography. Overlays dark gradients for readability. Typography is bold and sans-serif in a cream/yellow shade, creating an earthy contrast.
templates.hook: Full-bleed nature photography background (e.g., forest canopy) with a dark overlay to ensure text readability. Large, bold sans-serif typography in a cream/yellow shade is left-aligned. A brand logo icon is placed at the top. An arrow graphic points towards the next slide, suggesting movement.
templates.body: Full-bleed nature photography background with overlay. The layout features a bold cream/yellow headline at the top or side, with a block of white body text below. An arrow icon at the top right serves as a navigation cue. The design feels organic and immersive.
templates.cta: Full-bleed nature photography background. A bold 'Event Details' or similar headline in cream/yellow sits at the top. The center lists details in white sans-serif text. Social icons and a tagline are placed at the bottom, maintaining the environmental theme.

templates.description: Modern and bold aesthetic using a solid terracotta/burnt orange background. Features massive white bold sans-serif typography with transparent text layering effects. Dotted grid patterns add texture.
templates.hook: Solid warm terracotta background. Massive white bold sans-serif headline dominates the center. A transparent/muted repetition of the keyword is layered behind the main text for depth. A 'Swipe' indicator box with a cursor icon sits below the text. A dotted pattern grid accent decorates the bottom corner.
templates.body: Solid terracotta background. The top features a bold white headline with the transparent text layering effect. The body text is white and sans-serif. A 'Page' indicator pill is at the top right. The dotted grid pattern repeats in the corners, adding texture to the flat color.
templates.cta: Solid terracotta background. A circular profile photo frame is centered. Below it, a large white question or statement invites engagement. A handle or website URL is boxed at the top. The dotted pattern accent balances the composition at the bottom.
